C) Alec Jeffreys D) Maheshwari
197. VNTR stands for-(Pg. 122, E)
A) Various number of Tendon Repeats
B) Variable Number of Tendon Repeats
C) Various Number of Tandem Repeats
D) Variable Number of Tandem Repeats
198. VNTR belongs to- Pg. 122, E)
A) Micro-satellite
B) Macro-satellite
C) Mini-satellite
D) All of these
199. Pg. 123, E)

In the given figure if ‘C’ is the DNA
collected from crime site and ‘A’ & ‘B’ are
samples from suspects, than who is the
criminal?
A) B B) A
C) Both A and B D) None of these
